name: Delta Schools
description_short: Federal credit union serving the Antioch, CA area with membership-based checking, savings, and loan products including auto financing and credit cards.
description_long: Delta Schools Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative based in Antioch, California, with two physical branch locations serving the local community. The institution operates as a traditional credit union, emphasizing personalized service and competitive rates for its membership base. The credit union offers a full suite of consumer banking products including deposit accounts (checking and savings), auto loans, personal loans, and credit card services. They differentiate themselves through surcharge-free ATM access, member-focused rates, and extended customer service options including a 24/7 phone teller line. The organization maintains regular business hours at two locations (18th Street and Lone Tree branches) and provides educational resources about credit unions and fraud protection. While they offer competitive auto loan rates (as low as 5.99% APR for new vehicles and 6.19% for used), their Visa card rate of 9.90% APR is standard for the industry. Delta Schools FCU positions itself as a community-oriented alternative to traditional banks, though service is limited to their geographic footprint and membership eligibility requirements typical of credit unions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: New auto loans (as low as 5.99% APR)
Used auto loans (as low as 6.19% APR)
Visa credit cards (as low as 9.90% APR)
Auto buying center for vehicle financing
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.99% APR for new vehicles and 6.19% for used vehicles
24/7 phone teller service accessible at 833-631-1249 for convenient account access outside branch hours
Two physical branch locations with extended weekend hours at Lone Tree branch (Saturday 9am-3pm)
Surcharge-free ATM locator tool and network access for members
Student accounts available with specialized checking/savings products
In-house auto buying center to help members finance vehicles at competitive rates
Member-focused institution with educational resources about credit union benefits
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Antioch, CA region with only two branch locations
Main branch (18th Street) has limited hours with no weekend availability (Mon-Fri 9am-5pm only)
Visa credit card APR of 9.90% is at the higher end of competitive market rates
Limited online information about other loan products, terms, fees, or membership requirements
No mention of digital banking capabilities, mobile apps, or remote account opening options
best_for: Antioch, CA residents seeking personalized banking and competitive auto loan rates
Credit union members looking for member-owned institution benefits and surcharge-free ATM access
Local students interested in specialized student checking and savings accounts
Individuals seeking to finance vehicles through an in-house auto buying center
diagnosis: Delta Schools Federal Credit Union is best for residents in the Antioch, California area seeking competitive auto financing and traditional banking services from a member-owned credit union. The main limitation is geographic restriction—membership and branch access are limited to the local community, making this unsuitable for those outside the Antioch service area or requiring robust digital banking capabilities.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
